ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event */,
  "iso" INTEGER /* ISO code for the country */,
  "event_id_cnty" TEXT /* Event ID with county reference */,
  "event_id_no_cnty" TEXT /* Event ID without county reference */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the event */,
  "time_precision" INTEGER /* Precision of the time reported for the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Battles, Explosions) */,
  "sub_event_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the event (e.g., Armed clash, Shelling) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the event */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the administrative area of the event */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month of the event */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., ongoing, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_id_cnty FOREIGN KEY ("event_id_cnty") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admin_areas ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor (e.g., military, civilian) */,
  "actor_type" TEXT /* Type of actor (e.g., Military Forces, Rebels) */,
  "associated_actor" TEXT /* Associated actor if applicable */,
  "actor_role" TEXT /* Role of the actor (e.g., aggressor, defender) */,
  "actor_affiliation" TEXT /* Political or organizational affiliation of the actor */,
  "actor_strength" TEXT /* Strength or size of the actor */,
  "actor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the actor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "geo_precision" INTEGER /* Precision of the geographical data */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region name */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country name */,
  "admin1" TEXT /* First administrative division */,
  "admin2" TEXT /* Second administrative division */,
  "admin3" TEXT /* Third administrative division */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "infrastructure_impact" TEXT /* Impact on infrastructure */,
  "cultural_significance" TEXT /* Cultural significance of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., news outlets, NGOs) */,
  "source_scale" TEXT /* Scale of the source (e.g., National, Subnational) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the source */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the source */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for the source's website or report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatalities" (
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fatality record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related event */,
  "fatality_count" INTEGER /* Count of fatalities reported for the event */,
  "has_fatalities" INTEGER /* Indicates if fatalities occurred in the event */,
  "fatality_type" TEXT /* Type of fatalities (e.g., civilians, military) */,
  "fatality_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the fatalities */,
  "fatality_age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the fatalities */,
  "fatality_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the fatalities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the interaction record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related event */,
  "actor1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first actor involved in the interaction */,
  "actor2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second actor involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., military versus civilians) */,
  "interaction_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the interaction */,
  "interaction_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the interaction (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "interaction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_actor2_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor2_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_actor1_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor1_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_timestamps" (
  "timestamp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestamp entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related event */,
  "record_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created or updated */,
  "timestamp_type" TEXT /* Type of timestamp (e.g., creation, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_areas" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the administrative area */,
  "admin1" TEXT /* First administrative division */,
  "admin2" TEXT /* Second administrative division */,
  "admin3" TEXT /* Third administrative division */,
  "admin3_pcode" TEXT /* Postal code for the third administrative division */,
  "admin_area_type" TEXT /* Type of administrative area (e.g., state, province, district) */,
  "admin_area_population" INTEGER /* Population of the administrative area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related event */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., incident report, summary) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the note */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related event */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., general, specific) */,
  "note_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the note (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, policy-maker) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
